steps.assistant_text: Splat symbol-boundary class (same as gl_func_0004D084). `if (!(*a0 & 1)) a0[2] = 0;` — 6-insn body byte-exact at -O2, but objdiff scored 83% because game_libs_func_00068BF4.s was cut at the bare `jr ra` (size 0x18) while -O2 owns the jr-ra delay nop (0x1C). Merged the delay nop into the .s (0x18->0x1C) so the baseline function symbol matches real -O2 codegen. The true ROM slot is 0x20 (2 trailing nops); the 2nd word is supplied by the next fn gl_func_00068C14's existing leading pad, so no SUFFIX needed. Verified vs INCLUDE_ASM baseline (refresh-expected-baseline.py): 100.0 + clean-build ROM byte-identical.
